purpose: Machine-readable implementation state for the AI_book-derived Theseus roadmap. This is the governed bridge between roadmap.md prose and registry-owned implementation work.

long_optimizer_machine_enforcement.rule: Finite-update canaries may execute before readiness so architecture contracts can be proven. Any unbounded or greater-than-eight-step canonical optimizer run fails closed until the architecture readiness gate is GREEN.

pre_training_architecture_contract.completion_evidence_rule: A backlog item cannot become pre-training ready from prose, a schema, a happy-path fixture, a callable sidecar, or a toy proxy presented as the target mechanism. It requires canonical-path integration, registry ownership, content-bound source/config identity, checkpoint round trip when stateful, fresh-process replay, migration and rollback, resource bounds, positive/negative/adversarial/mutation tests, independent integrity, cleanup, and an explicit frozen-campaign disposition. Disabled mechanisms must prove zero optimizer exposure and fail closed against silent activation.
pre_training_architecture_contract.negative_verdict_adequacy_rule: A negative verdict is scoped to the exact implementation and regime tested. Broad falsification or architecture retirement requires an independent adequacy audit proving mechanism fidelity, learnability and gradient-flow sanity, strong matched baselines, matched data/compute/tuning/inference/verifier opportunity, source-disjoint independent evaluation, multiple seeds, uncertainty and weak-tail reporting, and sufficient power for the preregistered useful effect. Hand-coded proxies, linear probes, authored templates, missing learned stages, underpowered runs, or evaluator construct gaps are INCONCLUSIVE_IMPLEMENTATION or INCONCLUSIVE_EXPERIMENT and cannot retire the full mechanism. Campaign exclusion for sequencing or cost is not scientific falsification.
pre_training_architecture_contract.architecture_change_intake_rule: Before freeze, admit a new item only when adopting it after the campaign would invalidate weights, topology, representation/tokenization, objectives, routing or memory semantics, generation behavior, verifier state, update causality, checkpoint lineage, or autonomous campaign control. After freeze, new ideas target a successor campaign unless they expose a concrete correctness, security, information-flow, checkpoint, migration, or replay defect in the frozen package.
pre_training_architecture_contract.sequence_rule: Accepted idea intake -> finite docket disposition -> canonical integration -> content-addressed architecture freeze -> unchanged mechanics canaries -> joint campaign preregistration -> long training -> frozen utility evaluation -> causal amplifier qualification.
pre_training_architecture_contract.rule: Architecture readiness requires every architecture prerequisite and every finite cross-phase pre-training backlog contract to be fully wired, implemented, falsified, or retired before long optimizer spend. Training, empirical product qualification, public calibration, real-use evidence, and behavior-dependent efficacy remain follow-through rather than circular prerequisites, but their model, objective, state, checkpoint, routing, memory, verifier, resource, migration, rollback, and evaluation interfaces must already exist when later adoption would invalidate the campaign.
pre_training_architecture_contract.freeze_package_rule: Before long training, publish one independently replayed content-addressed architecture-freeze package binding topology and ownership, representation and context, objectives and update causality, generation and deliberation dispositions, execution and autonomy, evaluation contracts, state portability, registry identities, source/configuration digests, rollback routes, evidence refs, and non-claims. A matrix status or self-declared GREEN report alone cannot grant training authority.
pre_training_architecture_contract.allowed_before_freeze: Implementation, integration, deterministic replay, negative testing, migration testing, checkpoint round trips, and architecture canaries of at most eight optimizer steps are allowed. Full-corpus optimizer work, architecture tuning from interim losses, public calibration, and capability claims are not.
pre_training_architecture_contract.no_shortcut: A phase or backlog item may defer only evidence that intrinsically requires learned behavior, training, public calibration, real-use time, unavailable external peers, a future modality, or a checkpoint-compatible addition independently shown not to alter the campaign comparison. Missing contracts, authority, memory, evidence, deterministic tooling, runtime, migration, security, checkpoint lineage, campaign preregistration, objective plumbing, or governance remain architecture blockers. A speculative item may be retired before training; it may not remain vaguely planned and then silently invalidate the frozen run.

The current exact-pair run moved preference margin +1.803796 but regressed heldout behavior 1/24 -> 0/24 while the reward-removed control preserved 1/24; both reward checkpoints remain quarantined and cannot support default routing, public transfer, or learned-generation promotion.

The direct body-emission and state-transition profiles are training evidence only: direct body emission matched 128/128 private rows and 8054 token positions, local-return closure matched 79/128 rows and 1967 positions, and closed-state transition matched 127/128 rows and 9637 positions, but the paired broad strict replays still have 0 main candidate rows or 0 behavior passes.

The strict decode hygiene and generated-state return/dependency guards block malformed isinstance first-argument chains, bare builtin type runtime values, constant-only conditions, top-level returns that ignore visible inputs, and missing finalizer tokens for model-created visible-input accumulators; this is pathology-removal evidence only, because the paired broad canary still emits 0 learned rows and 0/4 behavior passes.

It is not learned-generation credit, not a renderer, and not a promotion route.

The body-action head is trainable structural-role evidence only: it activates over private body-continuation positions and can bias decode, but the first canary worsens heldout action loss/accuracy and strict replay still emits zero manifest rows with zero behavior passes. The two generated runtime-loaded verifier attempts are diagnostic shape movement, not admitted learned-generation improvement.

The body-operand/value binding head is trainable role evidence only: it improves heldout operand accuracy but not operand loss. When the existing learned-prefix adequacy route is enabled, the same checkpoint emits integrity-verified nontrivial transformer/hybrid rows, but behavior remains 0-pass and production routing fails closed on quality.

The operation-adequacy decode pass is diagnostic/ranking evidence only: it now reports missing_expected_update_call when the learned prefix predicts a call update but the body emits only assignment transforms, ranks prompt-visible operation evidence ahead of generic loop-score proxies, and lets prompt-visible operation tags propose operation-bearing branch/update tokens before the generic loop path preempts them. The bounded private canaries remain clean but behavior-zero: 4 integrity-verified generated rows, 0 integrity mismatches, nontrivial-return rate 1.0, and 0/2 private passes. The follow-up zero-credit semantic-operation value-construction canary preserves clean candidate integrity and emits 2 nontrivial transformer/hybrid private-eval rows, but still scores 0/2 private passes and exposes repeated max(max(... starvation plus shallow accumulator/type-handling failures rather than operation-bearing clamp/round or absolute-distance bodies.

The next governed step is broad semantic expression/body construction repair through semantic IR localized repair or a trainable AST/state-transition head, not another target-side weighting family, source-condition ranker, or diagnostic guard. Prompt/signature body-token decode now produces admitted non-fallback, non-template, nontrivial candidates under the canonical prefix-governed route, but those candidates are semantically shallow and must pass private verifier behavior before preference/RL scaling. DPO/IPO/ORPO/KTO/SimPO and GRPO/RLOO/ReMax/RLVR remain downstream of verifier behavior, not substitutes for it.

The state-machine event target canary is residual/training-signal evidence only: it activates a sharper private event policy and improves LM plus transition loss, but action/operand metrics still fail and no checkpoint is routeable. It does not support learned-generation promotion, public-transfer claims, or default routing.

The executable-span canary is also residual/training-signal evidence only: the dedicated span head and opt-in span-to-hidden body constructor improve LM/span/event metrics, but action/operand or tensor-update gates still fail and no checkpoint is routeable. It does not support learned-generation promotion, public-transfer claims, or default routing.

The first matched Sol 5.6 teacher curriculum ablation is valid negative evidence, not a promotion. Both arms score 0/48 across the same family-disjoint and broad-private tasks; teacher-on worsens heldout LM loss, emits 110 versus 135 integrity-verified learned candidates, increases decode starvation to 11 versus 2 tasks, and lowers mean verifier reward on both splits. The 14 manifest-admitted rows remain provenance-valid but are not causally useful under this recipe.

The operand/state-event prefix-context optimization and incremental MLX attention cache are behavior-exact runtime evidence only. The first removes a repeated vocabulary-times-prefix parse with a focused 27.96x speedup. The second proves every materialized output head within 1e-5, exact candidate/token identity, 832 ms -> 500 ms pre-verifier decode on the real 48-token canary, source encodes 47 -> 1, and atomic contract-bound resume reproducing all six clean-control candidate identities after interruption. This is not semantic capability, model promotion, or CUDA/MLX parity evidence.

The parameter-neutral prefix-LM control is valid negative architecture evidence. All 17,643 raw-code windows have no separator; all 12,111 SFT rows and 24 eval rows have exactly one canonical separator with loss strictly target-side. Matched causal/prefix arms use seed 20260711, equal parameters, 47 optimizer steps, 100260 supervised positions, and the same 24 family-disjoint tasks. Both produce zero syntax-valid candidates and 0/24 passes; prefix-LM worsens loss by 0.004548, SFT throughput by 270.604 tokens/s, and decode by 65 ms. Prefix-LM is NOT_ADOPTED and causal remains canonical.

book_chapter_implementation_crosswalk.book_beyond_state_of_art: A mature oversight control plane selects direct review, assisted consultation, structured adversarial review, or abstention based on task risk, access asymmetry, supervisor capability, calibrated outcome evidence, correlation risk, and available accountable escalation. book_interfaces: Evidence States and Claim Discipline owns how an outcome may affect a claim; this chapter owns the supervision protocol and its audit record.

A comparison that lacks a declared baseline, task cohort, or failure criterion cannot be interpreted as a scalable-oversight improvement.
Training and execution authority remain separate from protocol verdicts, even when an oversight result is favorable.

Outcome auditing observes only an easy or selected task cohort and hides capability-gap, calibration, or distribution-shift failures.

book_chapter_implementation_crosswalk.chapter_title: Capability Replacement and Rollback
book_chapter_implementation_crosswalk.part_title: Part I - Foundations, Alignment, and Governance
book_chapter_implementation_crosswalk.book_minimal_implementation: A replacement transaction schema with precheck, gate, commit, monitor, and rollback phases.
book_chapter_implementation_crosswalk.book_beyond_state_of_art: Capability replacement only works as a transaction control plane for the whole stack. Every candidate implementation enters as a transaction, not a hope: prior artifact, candidate artifact, field identity, authority ceiling, regression floor, evaluator boundary, canary scope, monitor window, rollback receipt, and residual inheritance are all first-class objects. In that end state, a capability can improve continuously without making the system forget what it used to know. Regressions follow the field forward, not the old implementation backward. Failed canaries become residuals. Rollbacks are rehearsed and owned. State migration is classified as reversible, compensatable, forked, or residual rather than treated as an implementation detail. A default route is therefore never just the latest winner; it is the candidate that survived the transaction while preserving the floor.

book_chapter_implementation_crosswalk.book_minimal_implementation: A policy optimization record schema, fixture, and finite Lean predicates that separate feedback, update constraints, evaluation, governance gates, rollback, and non-claims from unrun training results.

Policy optimization would not be a fine-tuning side quest attached to the generator. book_chapter_implementation_crosswalk.chapter_title: Data Engines, Continual Learning, and Unlearning
book_chapter_implementation_crosswalk.part_title: Part IV - Evidence, Implementation, and the Living Book
book_chapter_implementation_crosswalk.book_minimal_implementation: A viable first slice is a versioned data-admission receipt, a public-safe synthetic fixture, deterministic routing for missing controls, and a lineage ledger that keeps every candidate experimental until an independently evaluated training or deletion path is accepted.
book_chapter_implementation_crosswalk.book_beyond_state_of_art: The mature target is a stack-wide data governance plane that treats every learning input, synthetic descendant, replay item, deletion request, evaluation split, and derived model artifact as an auditable lifecycle object. It measures workload-specific coverage, contamination, utility, cost, privacy, freshness, and deletion propagation; compares replacement, accumulation, replay, quarantine, and retraining policies; and requires a verifier-backed lineage closure before a result can affect deployment or belief. This is a target architecture, not a current system result: support remains argument until scoped intake, training, unlearning, and descendant-verification evidence is independently replayed and accepted.
book_interfaces: Policy optimization consumes only receipt-bound feedback and data candidates, never an undocumented corpus mutation.
Artifact graphs bind datasets, generators, evaluations, checkpoints, derived artifacts, and deletion requests into replayable lineage records.
Benchmark ratchets supply split exclusions, contamination probes, regressions, and promotion blockers.
Procedural memory and VCM receive governed artifacts with provenance, permitted-use, retention, and revocation boundaries rather than free-floating examples.
SCF and evidence ledgers retain authority over deployment and claim promotion after a data-engine decision.
book_invariants: No input is eligible without recorded provenance, authority, split exclusions, contamination checks, retention policy, deletion scope, evaluation references, and residuals.
A synthetic-data lineage, replacement-or-accumulation policy, and residual boundary remain visible through every later admission decision.
A deletion request is not represented as verified forgetting until affected descendants and verification scope are recorded.
Data admission cannot by itself promote a learning, benchmark, privacy, safety, or capability claim.
Missing controls route to block, quarantine, or experimental-only handling rather than silent ordinary admission.
book_failure_modes: Provenance laundering through transformed, distilled, or mixed synthetic examples.
Exact-overlap checks that miss semantic leakage, benchmark memorization, or distributional shift.
Recursive synthetic-data replacement that loses tail coverage, or indiscriminate accumulation that retains poisoned, private, obsolete, or revoked data.
Deletion theater in which a request is logged while downstream checkpoints, adapters, caches, retrieval stores, and published artifacts remain unverified.
Promotion laundering in which a well-formed receipt is mistaken for evidence of model quality, safety, or unlearning.

book_chapter_implementation_crosswalk.beyond_sota_theseus_endpoint: A stack-wide descendant-aware data engine governs every learning input and derived artifact, compares lifecycle policies under workload-specific utility, coverage, contamination, privacy, freshness, cost, and revocation metrics, and requires independently replayed lineage closure before deployment or belief changes.

book_chapter_implementation_crosswalk.chapter_title: Artifact Steward Agents and Living Project Governance
book_chapter_implementation_crosswalk.part_title: Part IV - Evidence, Implementation, and the Living Book
book_chapter_implementation_crosswalk.book_minimal_implementation: A `PROJECT_STEWARD.yml` file plus a GitHub-oriented steward bot that labels issues, drafts plans, proposes work contracts, requests CI, summarizes pull requests, writes release notes, records evidence, opens sunset reviews, and never spends funds or merges to protected branches without policy approval.
book_chapter_implementation_crosswalk.book_beyond_state_of_art: A durable-artifact stack ultimately needs a project-lifecycle operating system. The steward would not be a project owner, treasurer, maintainer monopoly, or autonomous manager with implied rights. It would be a bounded continuity service that keeps mission, memory, roadmap, work, funds, compute, contributors, evidence, releases, governance, and sunset criteria inspectable across many human and AI work cycles. A mature steward OS would let every durable artifact carry an Artifact Steward Charter plus typed records for work contracts, contribution ledgers, treasury policy, event taint, steward action decisions, release evidence, federation contracts, and sunset review. The steward would propose, prepare, coordinate, and execute only inside explicit authority. Humans, maintainers, communities, project hives, personal hives, CI runners, and rented compute would receive scoped contracts rather than inheriting project authority.
book_interfaces: VCM preserves project memory, source documents, decisions, issues, releases, and unresolved questions.
PlanForge and Talos turn goals into milestones, issues, jobs, reviews, artifacts, and releases.
Spinoza, Benchmaxxing, and evidence ledgers decide whether submitted work changes claim or readiness state.
TokenMana and treasury policies bound spending, compute rental, bounties, and recurring operations.
SCF, governance rights, and constitutional predicates prevent steward authority from replacing owner, maintainer, contributor, or community authority.
book_invariants: The steward is not the owner.
Mission, non-goals, and sunset criteria remain durable.
Spending is a bounded actuator governed by treasury policy.
Untrusted issues, pull requests, comments, and worker outputs enter as tainted context until reviewed.
Major governance changes require explicit proposal, review, delay, quorum, appeal, or guardian paths.
A project that no longer has value, users, maintainers, or funds can enter sunset mode rather than continuing activity for its own sake.
book_failure_modes: Mission drift from optimizing activity rather than purpose.
Treasury drain through low-value compute, bounty spam, or runaway recurring costs.
Governance capture by large holders, early maintainers, or steward-controlled scoring.
Agentic workflow injection through untrusted repository event context.
AI maintainer monopoly that makes the project opaque to humans.
Zombie project continuation after user value disappears.
representative_codex_tests: Treasury policy and event-taint fixture validation

book_chapter_implementation_crosswalk.book_minimal_implementation: A reference flow diagram, interface table, deterministic reference-trace fixtures, and a seven-stage name-to-effect trace that binds request-derived input, policy, canonical state, observed effect, acknowledged receipt, evaluator, and claim boundary while preserving blockers and non-claims.
book_chapter_implementation_crosswalk.book_beyond_state_of_art: The integration endpoint is a trace kernel for the whole ASI Stack. The stack would not be a diagram of cooperating layers; it would be an inspectable machine that can explain what authority entered, which artifacts were produced, what evidence changed, which residuals survived, and why a path was promoted, blocked, narrowed, rolled back, or escalated. A mature reference trace kernel would make every significant run emit a Reference Trace Record. The record would connect human intent, constitutional authority, command contracts, plan DAGs, VCM packets, route decisions, claim envelopes, work orders, execution logs, proof/spec receipts, benchmark ratchets, policy-update leases, steward decisions, SCF transitions, release notes, and residual ledgers.
